description: This solution scaffold a Kubernetes application.

teamName.description: Shortname of the team, used to prefix the resources like java package names, if not specified, githubUrl will be used.

teamName.ui:description: Shortname of the team, used to prefix the resources like java package names, if not specified, githubUrl will be used.

appLanguage.description: Select the programming language used by your application for scaffolding Kubernetes manifests.
appLanguage.title: Application Programming Language
appLanguage.ui:description: Select the programming language used by your application for scaffolding Kubernetes manifests.

appName.description: Specify the name of your application. This name will be used for the binary, the containing folder, and the core package name. For more information on package naming conventions, see [Go Package Names](https://go.dev/blog/package-names).
appName.title: Application Name
appName.ui:description: Specify the name of your application. This name will be used for the binary, the containing folder, and the core package name. For more information on package naming conventions, see [Go Package Names](https://go.dev/blog/package-names).

appURL.description: Specify the vanity URL for your application without including protocol (https or http). This is the URL that users will use to access your application.
appURL.title: Application Vanity URL
appURL.ui:description: Specify the vanity URL for your application without including protocol (https or http). This is the URL that users will use to access your application.

containerRegistryEnvironment.description: The environment (such as prod, qa, dev) that hosts the container registry. The registry stores the application's container images and should always be set to the highest-level environment, typically 'prod'.

ui:props.ui:text:
⚠️ **GitHub SSO session expired.**

To fix this:
1. Go to [Settings → Authentication Providers](/settings/auth-providers)
2. Find **GitHub Cloud** and click **Sign Out**
3. Click **Sign In** to re-authenticate
4. Return here and try again.

title: kubernetes-app Workflow Input Schema
